meta.name: t-SNE & diffusion-map embeddings (raw counts)
meta.description: Cluster raw counts, then compute two non-UMAP embeddings for comparison: t-SNE (obsm['X_tsne']) and a diffusion map (obsm['X_diffmap']). For unprocessed data such as Xenium.
meta.provenance: scanpy dimensionality-reduction / visualization tutorials (sc.tl.tsne, sc.tl.diffmap). Targets unprocessed raw-count data such as Xenium.

readme: Preprocess and Leiden-cluster raw counts, then add a t-SNE embedding and a diffusion-map embedding alongside the clustering. Diffusion maps emphasise continuous transitions (useful before trajectory analysis); t-SNE emphasises local cluster separation.

params.name: cluster_key
params.tooltip: obs column to write the Leiden cluster labels into

params.name: resolution
params.tooltip: Leiden resolution: higher = more, smaller clusters
